message:
feat: add ResizeObserver and devicePixelRatio support

- Add ResizeObserver to detect panel size changes
- Debounce resize events (100ms) to avoid flooding server
- Send resize via control WebSocket with panel_id
- Server queues resize requests for main thread processing
- Client sends devicePixelRatio when creating panel
- Server uses client's scale instead of hardcoded 2.0
- Remove old window resize handler and sendResize method
